hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】鲍威尔认为通胀前景受到控制，无需因石油冲击而加息；【FINANCE】Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程；【FINANCE】沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场。

items.title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell spoke Monday at Harvard University.
items.title_zh: 鲍威尔认为通胀前景受到控制，无需因石油冲击而加息
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔周一在哈佛大学发表讲话。

items.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.summary_zh: Visa 的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大努力的一部分。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
items.summary: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
items.summary_zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran still backs cuts, says interest rates could be 'about a point' lower this year
items.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran spoke Monday on CNBC's "Squawk on the Street."
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰仍然支持降息，称今年利率可能会降低“约一个点”
items.summary_zh: 美联储理事斯蒂芬·米兰周一在 CNBC 的“Squawk on the Street”节目中发表讲话。

items.title: Israel’s Message to a Broad Swath of Lebanon: Shiites Must Go
items.summary: Israel has issued sweeping evacuation warnings, and pressed some Christian and Druse leaders to expel Shiite Muslims from southern towns, the leaders said.
items.title_zh: 以色列向黎巴嫩广大地区发出的信息：什叶派必须下台
items.summary_zh: 领导人表示，以色列已发布全面疏散警告，并敦促一些基督教和德鲁兹领导人将什叶派穆斯林驱逐出南部城镇。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Gulf Nations and Israel Face New Attacks After Trump Claims Military Success
items.summary: President Trump said the United States would hit Iran “extremely hard” over the next two to three weeks. He said the war was already a success but did not offer a concrete exit timeline.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普声称军事成功后，海湾国家和以色列面临新的攻击
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，美国将在未来两到三周内“极其严厉”地打击伊朗。他表示战争已经取得成功，但没有提供具体的退出时间表。

items.title: Crypto markets tumble as oil surges and traders pile into bearish bets: Crypto Markets Today
items.summary: Bitcoin and ether fell sharply alongside global risk assets after escalating tension in Iran drove oil higher, while derivatives data shows traders positioning for further downside.
items.title_zh: 随着石油价格飙升和交易员纷纷看跌，加密货币市场暴跌：今日加密货币市场
items.summary_zh: 在伊朗紧张局势升级推动油价走高后，比特币和以太坊与全球风险资产一起大幅下跌，而衍生品数据显示交易者准备进一步下跌。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana slide further as Trump threatens to hit Iran 'extremely hard'
items.summary: Crypto and equities sold off after the president's national address undermined a two-day rally built on expectations the war was ending. Oil jumped 5% to above $106.
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁“极其严厉”打击伊朗，比特币、以太币和索拉纳进一步下滑
items.summary_zh: 在总统的全国讲话破坏了基于战争即将结束的预期而建立的为期两天的涨势后，加密货币和股票遭到抛售。油价上涨 5%，至 106 美元上方。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
items.summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特称伊朗炸弹将使核灾难更难以避免
items.summary_zh: 这位伯克希尔哈撒韦公司董事长表示，越来越多的核武器国家从根本上改变了全球风险格局。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he's still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags 'tiny' new buy
items.summary: The 95-year-old investor said he still comes into the office daily and stays engaged with markets.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他仍在呼吁伯克希尔的投资，并表示“小规模”新收购
items.summary_zh: 这位 95 岁的投资者表示，他仍然每天来到办公室并与市场保持联系。

items.title: Warren Buffett teams up with NBA superstar Stephen Curry for charity lunch, reviving iconic auction
items.summary: The winning bidder — along with up to seven guests — will join Buffett and the Currys for an exclusive lunch in Omaha, Nebraska.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特与 NBA 巨星斯蒂芬·库里合作举办慈善午餐，复兴标志性拍卖
items.summary_zh: 中标者以及最多七位客人将在内布拉斯加州奥马哈与巴菲特和库里家族一起享用独家午餐。

items.title: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
items.summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.
items.title_zh: 三大利基商品价格大幅上涨。它们显示了中国对供应链的控制
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争后，用于国防的关键元件和推动人工智能进步的半导体的价格飙升。

items.title: Bill Ackman says it’s one of the best times in a long time to buy quality stocks
items.summary: Ackman's bullish stance comes at a time when markets have been rattled by rising energy prices and sticky inflation concerns.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼表示，这是长期以来购买优质股票的最佳时机之一
items.summary_zh: 阿克曼的看涨立场是在市场因能源价格上涨和通胀担忧而感到不安之际提出的。

items.title: Trump leaves key questions unanswered as he seeks to calm nerves over Iran war
items.summary: There were some glaring omissions in the president's primetime address, writes the BBC's Gary O'Donoghue.
items.title_zh: 特朗普试图平息伊朗战争带来的紧张情绪，但未回答关键问题
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的加里·奥多诺霍 (Gary O'Donoghue) 写道，总统的黄金时段讲话中有一些明显的遗漏。

items.title: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits off Indonesia, killing one
items.summary: The quake struck between the islands of Manado and Ternate. Tsunami warnings have now been lifted.
items.title_zh: 印度尼西亚发生7.4级地震，造成1人死亡
items.summary_zh: 地震发生在美娜多岛和特尔纳特岛之间。海啸警报现已取消。

items.title: Israel intensifies Lebanon attacks and hits areas not in Hezbollah's control
items.summary: Attacks have continued as Israel has announced its intention to control swathes of south Lebanon.
items.title_zh: 以色列加强对黎巴嫩的袭击并袭击真主党控制之外的地区
items.summary_zh: 随着以色列宣布打算控制黎巴嫩南部大片地区，袭击仍在继续。

items.title: In UK Prisons, Drones Fly In Contraband ‘As if by Uber Eats’
items.summary: Decades-old prison buildings were designed to be secure from the ground but not the air. Experts say that makes a lucrative smuggling trade hard to tackle.
items.title_zh: 在英国监狱中，无人机飞入违禁品“就像通过 Uber Eats 优食一样”
items.summary_zh: 已有数十年历史的监狱建筑的设计初衷是保证地面安全，但空中安全却不然。专家表示，这使得利润丰厚的走私贸易难以打击。

items.title: Evacuated From War-Torn Gaza, 11 Toddlers Return Home to Hugs and Tears
items.summary: The Palestinian children were born prematurely in the early days of the war and moved from a besieged hospital to Egypt. They have now returned home to the enclave, which lies in ruins.
items.title_zh: 从饱受战争蹂躏的加沙撤离后，11 名幼儿满怀拥抱和泪水回到家中
items.summary_zh: 巴勒斯坦儿童在战争初期早产，从被围困的医院搬到了埃及。他们现在已经回到了已成为废墟的飞地的家。

items.title: Beyond T-bills: OpenEden introduces tokenized high-yield corporate bond
items.summary: The product further expands the tokenized real-world asset market beyond cash-equivalent and treasury strategies, which currently dominate the sector.
items.title_zh: 超越国库券：OpenEden 推出代币化高收益公司债券
items.summary_zh: 该产品进一步扩展了代币化的现实世界资产市场，超越了目前主导该行业的现金等价物和国债策略。

items.title: Ripple Treasury puts XRP and RLUSD inside corporate finance for the first time
items.summary: The treasury management system, built on Ripple's 2025 acquisition of GTreasury, lets CFOs view and manage digital assets alongside fiat in a single dashboard without separate custody or wallet infrastructure.
items.title_zh: Ripple Treasury 首次将 XRP 和 RLUSD 纳入企业融资
items.summary_zh: 该财务管理系统建立在 Ripple 2025 年收购 GTreasury 的基础上，让首席财务官可以在单个仪表板中查看和管理数字资产以及法币，而无需单独的托管或钱包基础设施。

items.title: Citadel-backed EDX Markets applies for U.S. trust charter to expand institutional crypto services
items.summary: The Citadel-backed exchange is seeking approval to offer custody and asset services as institutional demand grows.
items.title_zh: Citadel 支持的 EDX Markets 申请美国信托宪章以扩大机构加密服务
items.summary_zh: 随着机构需求的增长，Citadel 支持的交易所正在寻求批准提供托管和资产服务。

items.title: Drift says $280M exploit tied to ‘sophisticated’ admin takeover; ZachXBT criticizes Circle over USDC handling
items.summary: Drift said Wednesday's $280 million exploit was a result of unauthorized transaction approvals, facilitated through durable nonce mechanisms.
items.title_zh: Drift 称价值 2.8 亿美元的漏洞与“复杂”的管理员接管有关； ZachXBT 批评 Circle 对 USDC 的处理
items.summary_zh: Drift 表示，周三的 2.8 亿美元漏洞是未经授权的交易批准的结果，这是通过持久的随机数机制促成的。

items.title: Coinbase CLO Grewal says Clarity Act ‘very close’ to reaching deal on stablecoin yield
items.summary: Grewal said banks should not conflate the stablecoin yield issue with other challenges they are facing today.
items.title_zh: Coinbase CLO Grewal 表示《澄清法案》“非常接近”就稳定币收益率达成协议
items.summary_zh: 格雷瓦尔表示，银行不应将稳定币收益率问题与当前面临的其他挑战混为一谈。

items.title: Charles Schwab, Citadel-backed EDX joins list of crypto firms seeking national trust bank charter
items.summary: Crypto organizations to have applied for the charter include Bridge, Ripple, Circle, BitGo, Fidelity Digital Assets, and Paxos.
items.title_zh: Charles Schwab 和 Citadel 支持的 EDX 加入寻求国家信托银行执照的加密货币公司名单
items.summary_zh: 已申请该章程的加密货币组织包括 Bridge、Ripple、Circle、BitGo、Fidelity Digital Assets 和 Paxos。

items.title: Trending Crypto: StakeStone (STO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #197.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：StakeStone (STO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 197 名。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Nomina (NOM)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #614.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Nomina (NOM)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#614。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Siren (SIREN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #199.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：海妖 (SIREN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 199。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Drift Protocol (DRIFT)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #639.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：漂移协议（DRIFT）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#639。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #108.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 108。

items.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
items.summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.
items.title_zh: Gradient Labs 为每一位银行客户提供人工智能客户经理
items.summary_zh: Gradient Labs 使用 GPT-4.1 和 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 为 AI 代理提供支持，以低延迟和高可靠性自动化银行支持工作流程。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: Liberate your OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 解放你的 OpenClaw

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可以测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: China’s Aiming for the Moon, and NASA Is Looking Over Its Shoulder
items.summary: The U.S. space agency launched a lunar flyby Wednesday, but Beijing is pursuing its own space program with formidable focus. Here’s what we know about it, in photos and videos.
items.title_zh: 中国瞄准月球，NASA 密切关注
items.summary_zh: 美国航天局周三发射了一次飞越月球的任务，但北京正在大力推行自己的太空计划。以下是我们通过照片和视频了解的情况。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/31/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Tuesday, 03/31/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selling Volatility: The Most Seductive Backtest in Finance [Quantt] Here is a strategy with a thirty-year track record. Se
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！卖出波动性：金融领域最诱人的回测 [Quantt] 这是一个拥有三十年记录的策略。硒

items.title: The bitcoin treasury boom is unwinding as some companies and governments sell holdings
items.summary: Falling prices and prolonged consolidation are pushing public firms and sovereign holders to liquidate bitcoin reserves to shore up balance sheets.
items.title_zh: 随着一些公司和政府出售所持比特币，比特币国债热潮正在消退
items.summary_zh: 价格下跌和长期整合正在推动上市公司和主权持有者清算比特币储备以支撑资产负债表。

items.title: Metaplanet acquires 5,075 BTC, jumps to third largest bitcoin treasury company
items.summary: Japan-based firm strengthens its position with nearly $400 million purchase, surpassing MARA Holdings in global rankings.
items.title_zh: Metaplanet 收购 5,075 BTC，跃居第三大比特币财务公司
items.summary_zh: 这家日本公司以近 4 亿美元的收购巩固了其地位，在全球排名中超过了 MARA Holdings。

items.title: Bitcoin traders keep chasing Trump’s Iran noise. The real signals are elsewhere.
items.summary: Bitcoin and other risk assets have been whipsawed by President Donald J. Trump’s shifting rhetoric on Iran. Here are some indicators that help cut through the noise.
items.title_zh: 比特币交易员一直在追逐特朗普的伊朗言论。真正的信号在别处。
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·J·特朗普总统对伊朗的言论不断变化，比特币和其他风险资产受到重创。以下是一些有助于消除噪音的指标。

items.title: Oil trader takes $17 million hit as tokenized crude rivals bitcoin liquidations
items.summary: Brent crude futures on Hyperliquid recorded $46.6 million in liquidations, behind only ether and bitcoin. The single largest liquidation was a $17.17 million oil position.
items.title_zh: 石油交易商因代币化原油竞争对手比特币清算而损失 1700 万美元
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 上的布伦特原油期货清算额达到 4660 万美元，仅次于以太坊和比特币。单笔最大的清算是价值 1,717 万美元的石油头寸。

items.title: Metaplanet adds 5,075 bitcoin, bringing total holdings to 40,177 BTC to become third-largest among public companies
items.summary: Metaplanet added 5,075 BTC, increasing its total holdings to 40,177 BTC and placing it third among public treasury companies.
items.title_zh: Metaplanet 增持 5,075 比特币，使总持有量达到 40,177 比特币，成为上市公司中第三大比特币
items.summary_zh: Metaplanet 增持了 5,075 BTC，使其总持有量增至 40,177 BTC，在公共财务公司中排名第三。

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
items.summary: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.
items.title_zh: 中国AI落后美国竞争对手，华为2025年云计算收入下降
items.summary_zh: 当包括内部客户时，这家电信巨头表示云计算收入较一年前有所增长。

items.title: Watch the moment Artemis II blasts into space
items.summary: After delays and technical issues, the first crewed Moon mission in 50 years finally took off from Florida and is now in Earth's orbit.
items.title_zh: 观看阿耳忒弥斯二号升入太空的那一刻
items.summary_zh: 经过延误和技术问题后，50 年来首次载人登月任务终于从佛罗里达州起飞，目前已进入地球轨道。

items.title: Utah teen identified as victim of serial killer Ted Bundy
items.summary: New DNA testing has solved the 51-year-old case of murdered teenager Laura Ann Aime, according to investigators.
items.title_zh: 犹他州青少年被确认为连环杀手泰德·邦迪的受害者
items.summary_zh: 据调查人员称，新的 DNA 检测已经侦破了 51 岁青少年劳拉·安·艾梅 (Laura Ann Aime) 被谋杀案。

items.title: US Supreme Court appears sceptical of Trump plan to limit birthright citizenship
items.summary: Trump attended the arguments in person, a rare move by a sitting president.
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院似乎对特朗普限制出生公民权的计划持怀疑态度
items.summary_zh: 特朗普亲自出席辩论，这是现任总统罕见的举动。

items.title: Mass robotaxi malfunction halts traffic in Chinese city
items.summary: Baidu has not responded to a request for comment about the outage, which affected at least 100 cars.
items.title_zh: 大规模机器人出租车故障导致中国城市交通中断
items.summary_zh: 百度尚未回应有关此次停电的置评请求，此次停电影响了至少 100 辆汽车。

items.title: Families cram into Greek court for trial into deadliest train crash
items.summary: Fifty-seven people were killed when two trains collided in 2023 in the worst rail accident in Greek history, with 36 accused in a trial expected to last years.
items.title_zh: 家人涌入希腊法院接受最严重火车事故的审判
items.summary_zh: 2023 年，两列火车相撞，造成 57 人死亡，这是希腊历史上最严重的铁路事故，预计将持续数年进行审判，其中 36 人被指控。

items.title: Devastated Italians reckon with 'third apocalypse' of World Cup failure
items.summary: Azzurri fans and management alike are pondering what went wrong after Italy fail to qualify for third World Cup in a row.
items.title_zh: 悲痛欲绝的意大利人面临着世界杯失败的“第三次灾难”
items.summary_zh: 意大利队连续第三次未能获得世界杯参赛资格后，蓝衣军团的球迷和管理层都在思考到底出了什么问题。

items.title: Explosions at Burundi ammunition depot kill 13 civilians - army
items.summary: Powerful blasts destroyed homes and sparked panic in the city of Bujumbura on Tuesday night.
items.title_zh: 布隆迪弹药库爆炸造成13名平民死亡 - 军队
items.summary_zh: 周二晚上，强烈的爆炸摧毁了布琼布拉市的房屋并引发恐慌。

items.title: In a Muzzled Russia, He Still Speaks His Mind
items.summary: While hundreds of other journalists fled into exile after Moscow’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022, the Nobel Peace Prize laureate Dmitri A. Muratov stayed. But he did not stay quiet.
items.title_zh: 在被封口的俄罗斯，他仍然说出自己的想法
items.summary_zh: 2022 年莫斯科入侵乌克兰后，数百名记者逃亡，但诺贝尔和平奖获得者德米特里·A·穆拉托夫 (Dmitri A. Muratov) 留下来了。但他并没有保持沉默。

items.title: After Sting Operation, Cousin of Bashar al-Assad Convicted in Arms for Drugs Deal
items.summary: The cousin, Antoine Kassis, was found guilty of conspiracy to support a terrorist group, after trying to sell weapons from the fallen regime to a Colombian militia.
items.title_zh: 诱捕行动后，巴沙尔·阿萨德的表弟因毒品交易被判武器罪名成立
items.summary_zh: 他的表弟安托万·卡西斯 (Antoine Kassis) 在试图向哥伦比亚民兵出售倒台政权的武器后，被判犯有串谋支持恐怖组织罪。

items.title: U.S. Plans Military Expansion in Greenland
items.summary: The Pentagon is in talks with Denmark for access to three more areas on the Arctic island. Several Greenlanders said they didn’t like the idea.
items.title_zh: 美国计划在格陵兰岛军事扩张
items.summary_zh: 五角大楼正在与丹麦就进入北极岛屿上另外三个地区的事宜进行谈判。一些格陵兰人表示他们不喜欢这个想法。

items.title: Try Living in Cape Town, Where 70% of Downtown Housing Is for Tourists
items.summary: A shortage of affordable housing in the coastal city in South Africa has forced many people to live far outside the city center, while tourists occupy prime real estate.
items.title_zh: 尝试住在开普敦，那里 70% 的市中心住房都是为游客提供的
items.summary_zh: 南非沿海城市经济适用房的短缺迫使许多人住在远离市中心的地方，而游客却占据了黄金地段。

items.title: When Racism Is a Crime: Brazil Puts a Tourist on Trial for Word and Gesture
items.summary: An Argentine woman, who is white, could face years in prison after being accused of racism. The case has set off intense debate in Argentina and Brazil.
items.title_zh: 当种族主义成为犯罪：巴西因言语和手势而审判一名游客
items.summary_zh: 一名阿根廷白人妇女在被指控种族主义后可能面临数年监禁。此案在阿根廷和巴西引发激烈争论。

items.title: Solana DeFi platform Drift confirms 'active attack' as $200M+ leaves platform
items.summary: The platform halted deposits while it investigates suspicious activity and urges users to proceed with caution.
items.title_zh: Solana DeFi 平台 Drift 确认“主动攻击”，超过 2 亿美元离开平台
items.summary_zh: 该平台在调查可疑活动的同时停止了存款，并敦促用户谨慎行事。

items.title: Non-custodial wallet provider Safe unveils security network to turn SAFE tokens into economic good
items.summary: Safenet aims to prevent common security lapses, attack vectors, and transaction errors, like phishing schemes or malicious code deployments.
items.title_zh: 非托管钱包提供商 Safe 推出安全网络，将 SAFE 代币转化为经济商品
items.summary_zh: Safenet 旨在防止常见的安全漏洞、攻击媒介和交易错误，例如网络钓鱼计划或恶意代码部署。

items.title: Alabama governor signs bill creating legal framework for DAO-like nonprofit entities
items.summary: The bill stipulates that members of a decentralized nonprofit association generally have no personal liability for its activities.
items.title_zh: 阿拉巴马州州长签署法案，为类似 DAO 的非营利实体创建法律框架
items.summary_zh: 该法案规定，去中心化非营利协会的成员一般对其活动不承担个人责任。

items.title: eToro rolls out crypto trading in New York three years after receiving BitLicense
items.summary: Andrew McCormick, head of eToro U.S., said it was the first firm to receive a BitLicense in 2023 following the collapse of FTX.
items.title_zh: eToro 在获得 BitLicense 三年后在纽约推出加密货币交易
items.summary_zh: eToro 美国负责人 Andrew McCormick 表示，在 FTX 倒闭后，该公司是第一家在 2023 年获得 BitLicense 的公司。

items.title: Monad tops $350 million TVL milestone as low fees, falling FDV signal caution
items.summary: Monad still accounts for less than 0.4% of the approximately $91 billion total TVL tracked across all chains.
items.title_zh: Monad 因费用低廉而突破 3.5 亿美元 TVL 里程碑，FDV 下降信号谨慎
items.summary_zh: 在所有链上跟踪的约 910 亿美元的总 TVL 中，Monad 所占的比例仍然不到 0.4%。

items.title: Bithumb crypto exchange stretches IPO timeline to 2028
items.summary: Bithumb is extending its IPO runway as it works through internal fixes while rival Upbit works on its own public listing.
items.title_zh: Bithumb 加密货币交易所将 IPO 时间表延长至 2028 年
items.summary_zh: Bithumb 正在通过内部修复来扩展其 IPO 跑道，而竞争对手 Upbit 则致力于自己的公开上市。

items.title: ‘Not an April Fools joke’: Major Solana-based trading platform Drift exploited for at least $200 million
items.summary: The exploit, which started over two hours ago, seems to be targeting multiple Drift vaults, totaling at least $200 million.
items.title_zh: “不是愚人节玩笑”：基于 Solana 的主要交易平台 Drift 被利用至少 2 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该漏洞利用于两个多小时前开始，似乎针对多个 Drift 金库，总计至少 2 亿美元。

items.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.title_zh: 加速人工智能的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 筹集了 1220 亿美元的新资金，用于在全球范围内扩展前沿人工智能，投资下一代计算，并满足对 ChatGPT、Codex 和企业人工智能不断增长的需求。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.title_zh: 帮助救灾团队将人工智能转化为亚洲各地的行动
items.summary_zh: 亚洲救灾人工智能：与盖茨基金会合作的 OpenAI 研讨会

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.title_zh: 推动 ChatGPT 中的产品发现
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了由 Agentic Commerce Protocol 支持的更丰富、视觉沉浸式购物，从而实现产品发现、并排比较和商家集成。

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: TRL v1.0: Post-Training Library Built to Move with the Field
items.title_zh: TRL v1.0：专为随场移动而构建的训练后库

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.summary: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.
items.title_zh: Lyria 3 Pro：在更多 Google 产品中创建更长的曲目
items.summary_zh: 我们将 Lyria 3 引入专业人士每天工作和创作的工具中。

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
items.summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 如何创造“谦逊”的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院领导的团队正在设计用于医疗诊断的人工智能系统，该系统对于不确定性更具协作性和主动性。
